mapper.sql: select article_id, manuscript_id, issue_id, column_id, title, subtitle, author_names, abstract, keywords, content, page_start, page_end, word_count, status, publish_time, view_count, cnki_title, cnki_match_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from publisher_article
mapper.update: update publisher_article set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where article_id = #{articleId}
update publisher_article set cnki_title = #{cnkiTitle}, cnki_match_status = #{cnkiMatchStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_article where article_id in
#{articleId}
